nodes.label: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Session summary for 17 Jun 2026 — Phase 3 cleanup: dead code removal, simulated saves → real API calls, alert() → toast(), console.error() → toast+error UI, live data wiring, broken button fixes, React 19 lint fixes, new MDM monthly records endpoint. Both frontend (Next.js) and backend (Fastify) compile cleanly.
highlights: Dead code removed: page.module.css, decorative header buttons, unused imports, studentsData.mock
Simulated saves replaced with real API calls across calculator, bank-commission, mdm-record, profile/edit, income-expense
alert() → toast() in 8 files; console.error() → toast+error UI in 3 files
Live data wired to operational-dashboard, monthly-sales-report, dashboard, pending-customers, customers, sales, dealers, verify-identity
New backend endpoint POST/GET /mdm/monthly-records with service, controller, migration
React 19 lint fixes: ref assignments moved from render body to useEffect
Build status: both backend and frontend compile cleanly (next build passes, TypeScript clean)
34 → 14 lint errors remaining (pre-existing any type annotations and fetch-on-mount patterns)

nodes.label: events/index.ts

export type { EventType } from './event-bus.js'

nodes.label: types/models.ts
nodes.summary: Core data model interfaces for the eFPS system: Dealer, Session, OtpRequest, Beneficiary, StockAllocation, Transaction, AuditLog, Notification, PaginationMeta, ApiResponse, ApiError, JwtPayload, AuthUser.
highlights: Dealer: id, fps_id, area_id, full_name, mobile, address, district, taluka, village, password_hash, role, is_active, is_verified, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, last_login_at
Session: id, dealer_id, refresh_token_hash, user_agent, ip_address, expires_at
Beneficiary: ration_card_no, head_of_family, member_count, category (APL/BPL/AAY/PHH)
StockAllocation: month, commodity, allocated_kg, lifted_kg
Transaction: beneficiary_id, transaction_date, month, commodity, quantity_kg, price_per_kg, total_amount, mode (pos/manual/otg), biometric_auth
ApiResponse<T> envelope pattern with success + data + optional PaginationMeta
ApiError with code, message, field, statusCode
JwtPayload: sub, role, fps_id

nodes.label: types/enums.ts
nodes.summary: Enum definitions: Role (dealer/area_officer/admin), AccountStatus, CommodityType (Rice/Wheat/Sugar/Kerosene/Oil/Pulses), BeneficiaryCategory (APL/BPL/AAY/PHH), TransactionMode (pos/manual/otg), NotificationType (info/warning/alert), OtpPurpose (password_reset/verify_mobile/2fa).
highlights: Role: DEALER, AREA_OFFICER, ADMIN — 3-tier hierarchy
CommodityType: Rice, Wheat, Sugar, Kerosene, Oil, Pulses — 6 PDS commodities
BeneficiaryCategory: APL, BPL, AAY, PHH — 4 ration categories
TransactionMode: pos, manual, otg — 3 transaction modes
OtpPurpose: password_reset, verify_mobile, 2fa — 3 OTP use cases

nodes.label: events/EventTypes.ts

nodes.label: shared/sync/
nodes.summary: Data sync pipeline: 4 service files — normalization.service.ts, quarantine.service.ts, system-events.service.ts, validation.service.ts.
highlights: normalization.service.ts — data cleaning (names, mobile, dates, addresses, ration card numbers, numeric values)
quarantine.service.ts — stores invalid records in sync_quarantine table with error details
system-events.service.ts — best-effort event logging into system_events table
validation.service.ts — record validation with rules per type (beneficiary, transaction, stock_allocation, lifting_record)

nodes.label: sync/normalization.service.ts
nodes.summary: Record normalization pipeline: title-case names, mobile number normalization (+91 format), date parsing (ISO/flexible), address/ration card cleaning, numeric parsing.
highlights: toTitleCase: strips non-alpha chars, single spaces, title-cases each word
normalizeMobile: 10-digit → +91 prefix; handles 91/091 prefixed variants
normalizeDate: ISO strings AND DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY/MM/DD slash/dot/hyphen formats
normalizeRecord: dispatches to field-specific normalizers based on key name
NormalizedFields interface: beneficiary_name, father_name, address, district, taluka, ration_card_no, mobile_no, dates, allocated/lifted/amount

nodes.label: sync/quarantine.service.ts
nodes.summary: Quarantine storage for failed sync records. insertQuarantineRecords stores into sync_quarantine table with dealer_id, raw_data (JSONB), errors (JSONB), source. getQuarantineSummary aggregates by type and error code.
highlights: insertQuarantineRecords: bulk INSERT into sync_quarantine with dealer_id, sync_job_id, record_type, raw_data::jsonb, errors::jsonb, source
getQuarantineSummary: COUNT + JSONB_AGG grouped by record_type and error code, optional dealer_id filter
QuarantineEntry interface: dealerId, syncJobId, recordType, rawData, errors, source (default 'playwright')
QuarantineSummary: total count + byType + byReason breakdowns
Depends on database pool and ValidationError type

nodes.label: sync/system-events.service.ts
nodes.summary: System event logging service. insertSystemEvent inserts into system_events table with type, severity (info/warn/error/critical), source, message, metadata JSONB, trace_id. getRecentEvents fetches with optional severity filter.
highlights: insertSystemEvent: best-effort (try/catch with empty catch), inserts into system_events
getRecentEvents: ORDER BY created_at DESC, optional severity filter
SystemEventInput: eventType, severity (info|warn|error|critical), source, message, metadata?, traceId?

nodes.label: sync/validation.service.ts
nodes.summary: Record validation rule engine. 4 record types (beneficiary, transaction, stock_allocation, lifting_record) with rules: required fields, numeric validation, date validation, ration card format, positive quantity (lifted <= allocated). validateRecord returns {valid, errors, warnings}. validateBatch splits into pass/fail arrays.
highlights: RecordType: beneficiary, transaction, stock_allocation, lifting_record
Required fields per type defined in requiredFields map

Rules: makeRequiredRule, makeNumericRule (checks NaN + negative), makeDateRule (valid Date parse), makeRationCardRule (length 4-20, alphanumeric+/), makePositiveQuantityRule (lifted <= allocated → warning not error)
validateRecord: run all rules, classify LIFTED_EXCEEDS_ALLOCATED as warning
validateBatch: bulk split into pass (with warnings) and fail (with errors)
ValidationError: field, message, code

nodes.label: srv-out.txt
nodes.summary: Server runtime log. Persistent Redis version error (requires >=5.0, has 3.0.504) repeated ~100 times from BullMQ. Server starts successfully on http://localhost:3000 (IPv6 + IPv4). Auth failing: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 401 (2 attempts). All /api/v1/hierarchy/* endpoints return 401 (unauthenticated requests).
highlights: CRITICAL: Redis version 3.0.504 too old for BullMQ (requires >=5.0) — repeated ~100 times
Server runs on http://localhost:3000 and http://[::1]:3000
/health and /ready endpoints return 200 OK
POST /api/v1/auth/login → 401 (authentication failure)
GET /api/v1/hierarchy/state/2026-06 → 401
GET /api/v1/hierarchy/search?q=ahmedabad → 401
GET /api/v1/hierarchy/months → 401
POST /api/v1/hierarchy/import/csv → 401
Response times: health ~4.6ms, login ~2-7ms, hierarchy ~0.6-1ms

nodes.label: srv-test.txt
nodes.summary: Server test log. Same Redis version error repeated. Server failed to start: EADDRINUSE on ::1:3000 — port already in use from previous instance.
highlights: Redis version error repeated ~90 times (same 3.0.504 < 5.0.0 issue)
EADDRINUSE: address already in use ::1:3000 — port conflict on restart
Failed to start server due to port conflict

edges.detail: events/index.ts re-exports from ./event-bus.js (EventTypes class exists there, not in separate EventTypes.ts)
models.ts imports RoleType, CommodityTypeType, BeneficiaryCategoryType, TransactionModeType, NotificationTypeType from ./enums.js
Uses dealer_id UUID pattern matching Dealer model — stores records linked to dealers
validation.service.ts validates after normalization would have cleaned data; validateBatch → normalized records then validated
normalization cleans data → validation checks → failed records go to quarantine.service.ts
Stores system events that may reference dealer_ids matching Dealer model
Both logs show same Redis version error pattern; srv-out.txt shows successful boot + 401s, srv-test.txt shows EADDRINUSE failure
Login flow screenshots: login page → login failed state
Login flow screenshots: login page → login stuck state
Two distinct auth failure scenarios: first-level login failure → second-level (2FA) auth failure
srv-out.txt shows POST /api/v1/auth/login → 401; login-failed.png screenshot visually confirms auth failure UI state
Both under src/shared/ — events module and sync module are sibling shared subsystems used by workers mentioned in AGENTS.md (efpsSyncWorker, domainEventsWorker)
AGENTS.md documents simulated saves → real API calls that post data matching these model interfaces (Dealer, Transaction, StockAllocation, Beneficiary, etc.)
AGENTS.md mentions rate limiting (429) troubleshooting and ::1 allow list; srv-out.txt confirms server running on ::1:3000
